this_title: Falling in Love with My Mafia Husband
introduction: Emma, the wife of a notorious mafia boss named Ethan Green, finds herself having lost five years of memories after a car bombing-an attack that happened just as she was trying to leave him in search of a quieter life, far from the constant dangers of Ethan's criminal world. In an attempt to win her back, Ethan assumes a new identity, Lucas, and moves in next door to Emma's apartment. Over time, the two begin to rediscover their bond, along with plenty of plot twists along the way.—PiccoloR-3
chinese_title: Falling in Love with My Mafia Husband
